BatchEepromRead
BatchEepromRead

Contains logic for the Batch Eeprom Read Node command

Functions
buildCommand
static ByteStream buildCommand(
NodeAddress nodeAddress,
uint16 startAddress
)

Builds the ReadEeprom command packet

Parameters
nodeAddress
NodeAddress

the address of the Node to build the command for.

startAddress
uint16

the Eeprom address to start reading from.

Returns

A ByteStream containing the command packet
